author: Haroen Viaene
subject: v6.7.0
body:
# [6.7.0](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v6.5.0...v6.7.0) (2020-07-20)

### Bug Fixes

* **core:** appending successful index search results by returning new object reference ([algolia/react-instantsearch#2953](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/2953)) ([58a0b1c](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/58a0b1c))
* **ssr:** remove second instance of "query" in the response "params" for SSR ([algolia/react-instantsearch#2945](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/2945)) ([ffe18b6](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/ffe18b6)), closes [#2941](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/2941)

### Features

* **infinite-hits:** support cache ([algolia/react-instantsearch#2921](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/2921)) ([e58333a](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/e58333a))
